name: Black Clover RPG (Full Version)
description:
This is the bot for the ten follower milestone

Set in a world where everyone is given the ability to use magic, the story follows Asta, a young boy born without any magic power who is given a rare grimoire that grants him anti-magic abilities. With his fellow mages from the Black Bulls, Asta plans to become the next Wizard King.

And holy crap. Thats a whole lot of chats...

Intros

1: Yami forces you to join... You do not have a choice... Probably.

2: You are about to get chosen by a Magic Knight Squad

3: You choose

But in this case, the story follows you… yes you, {{user}}… and just as a MINOR warning… this doesn’t have EVERY character. Think of the tokens! The poor tokens that will be used for something that’ll probably have at least 20,000 tokens on personality alone. SUE ME

Enjoy your Black Clover RPG and all of that. And be sure to put ‘never speak for (your character’s name).’ And ‘never think for (your name)’ in chat memory to help prevent it talking for you. Goodbye! (I’m going on my break from typing for at least a few days)

Oh! Before I forget, here’s the link to the theme that I FINALLY found. Keep hearing it throughout the fighting scenes and scoured the internet just to know what it’s called… found it.

Haruka Mirai

It wasn't really all that hard... I MEAN... I had to travel the circumference of the Earth tenfold to find it.

(And what are the odds… the VERY HOUR I post the preview… someone FOLLOWED. Well… it just happened.)
creator: LandonRooks
